topics.title: Individual Differences in Brain Network Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how functional connectivity and brain network organization vary across individuals and states, with emphasis on brain fingerprinting, individualized parcellation, and structure-function coupling. It also includes work on resting-state dynamics, brain maps, and emerging brain foundation models for characterizing human brain diversity.

topics.title: Neurodegeneration and Cognitive Decline
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodegenerative disorders, especially Alzheimer and Parkinson disease, and their links to cognitive decline, impairment, and brain atrophy. It also includes biomarkers and disease states across the continuum from preclinical disease to dementia.

topics.title: Human Brain MRI Development and Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on human brain MRI studies of cortical development, folding, and high-resolution anatomy across multiple field strengths. It also emphasizes automated segmentation and related quantitative or computational approaches for analyzing brain structure.

topics.title: Depression, Anxiety, and Trauma-related Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on depressive and anxiety disorders, especially major depressive disorder, and their links to trauma, childhood adversity, and suicidality. It also includes related clinical features such as resilience and treatment-resistant presentations.

topics.title: Neural Basis of Visual Memory and Imagery
topics.description: This cluster centers on how visual imagery, working memory, recall, and attention are represented in visual and motor brain regions. It also includes action observation and related neural correlates in human neuroimaging studies.

topics.title: Developmental Brain Structure Across Childhood
topics.description: This cluster centers on normative and atypical brain development from infancy through adolescence, with emphasis on structural brain measures and white matter maturation. It also highlights influences of prematurity and sex differences across developmental stages.

topics.title: Neural Basis of Emotion Regulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on how emotion regulation, self-related processing, and social cognition are represented in the brain, with emphasis on amygdala and prefrontal mechanisms. Studies link anxiety and adolescence to neural correlates of emotion processing, valence, and regulatory control.

topics.title: Neural Basis of Language and Speech Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on language and speech processing, especially developmental and acquired disorders such as dyslexia and aphasia. It also emphasizes neural organization of the language network and related brain-imaging and stimulation studies.

topics.title: Cerebrovascular and Metabolic Aging in Brain
topics.description: The cluster centers on how aging and type 2 diabetes relate to cerebrovascular physiology, brain signal coupling, and glucose metabolism in the human brain. It also includes measures linking vascular function, white matter, and BOLD-related dynamics.

topics.title: Neuromodulation for Brain Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on noninvasive and invasive neuromodulation approaches such as tms, dbs, and tes across psychiatric and neurological disorders. It also includes work on targets, functional connectivity, and treatment efficacy.

topics.title: Schizophrenia Spectrum Biomarkers and Prediction
topics.description: This cluster centers on schizophrenia and related psychosis-spectrum conditions, with emphasis on heterogeneity, familial risk, and clinical prediction. It highlights biomarker-oriented work using genetic and neuroimaging measures, including cortical structure and rs fmri.

topics.title: Stroke and Lesion Network Outcomes
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurological injury and disease states, especially stroke, traumatic brain injury, and multiple sclerosis, with emphasis on recovery, motor and cognitive outcomes, and fatigue. It also highlights network alteration and lesion network mapping as tools for prediction and understanding functional change.

topics.title: Deep Learning for Alzheimer Neuroimaging
topics.description: This cluster centers on applying machine learning and deep learning to neuroimaging, especially structural MRI, for Alzheimer disease analysis and classification. It also reflects the use of neuroimage datasets and open science resources to support 3D CNN-based modeling.

keywords: constrained dynamic functional connectivity predicts surgical outcome
topics.title: Epilepsy Connectivity and Surgical Localization
topics.description: This cluster centers on epilepsy research, especially temporal lobe and focal epilepsy, with emphasis on localizing epileptogenic and seizure onset zones. It also highlights connectivity-based analyses and predictive markers of surgical outcome in pediatric and intracranial EEG studies.

topics.title: Craving and Neurocircuitry in Addiction
topics.description: This cluster centers on addiction-related craving, cue reactivity, and substance use disorders across alcohol, cannabis, and other drugs. It also includes studies of adolescent brain development and neurocircuitry, alongside acute pharmacological challenges such as psilocybin and ketamine.

topics.title: Developmental Autism Subgroups and Brain Variation
topics.description: This cluster focuses on autism and related developmental stages across childhood and adolescence, emphasizing symptom variation and subgroup differences. It also highlights brain-behavior relationships and atypical developmental patterns in clinical ASD cohorts.

topics.title: Brain Mechanisms of Chronic Pain
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain conditions and their neural mechanisms, including fibromyalgia, migraine, and trigeminal neuralgia. It emphasizes pain perception, central sensitization, and brain-based differences linked to pain phenotypes.

topics.title: Sleep Dynamics and Brain Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on human sleep, especially NREM organization, spindles, and arousal transitions. It also highlights dynamic brain-state and connectivity changes during sleep, including glymphatic coupling and links to cognitive outcomes.

keywords: the dieter 's dilemma attentional focus on health
dynamic brain state reconfiguration during naturalistic food viewing a multimodal hmm analysis
topics.title: Neural and Behavioral Food Choice Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how attention, dieting, and food-related cues shape food choice and food decision processes. It also includes brain connectivity and dynamic imaging approaches used to study neural responses to naturalistic food viewing and appetite control.

keywords: music and emotion in functional connectivity
neurometabolic mechanisms of dynamic musical reward processing
cortico subcortical mechanisms of dynamic music reward processing
topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Music Experience
topics.description: This cluster centers on how music listening, participation, and training shape reward, emotion, memory, and sensorimotor brain systems. It also highlights neural and neurometabolic pathways linked to musical skill and music-related functional connectivity.
